Pesty Agent Skills

Built by Pesty Marketing ↗

The skills our team's AI agents run on — StoryBrand copy audits, buyer personas, UI reviews, on-brand dashboards, and more. One command installs all of them into every agent on your machine.

Works in Claude Code · Cursor · Codex · Gemini CLI

Get new skills as we ship them

We add a new skill every few weeks. Drop your email and we'll let you know — no spam, unsubscribe anytime.

Running a pest control company and want more than skills? Talk to Pesty →

How it works

1

Install once

Copy this into your terminal. Only prereq is Node.js — no GitHub account needed.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills -g
2

Open your agent

Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or Gemini CLI — every skill is now available in all of them, automatically.

Re-run the install command anytime to pull the latest versions.

3

Ask for a skill by name

“Use the storybrand skill to audit the copy on this homepage.”

Every card below has a ready-to-paste example prompt.

Skills

Writing & Messaging ann-handley

Everybody Writes

Make any marketing copy sound human — blogs, emails, social — using Ann Handley's rules.

Try this prompt
“Use the ann-handley skill to punch up this email draft.”
Details & solo install

Apply Ann Handley's Everybody Writes framework to create or audit marketing content — blog posts, emails, homepages, About Us pages, social copy, or any customer-facing writing. Invoke when user says "use Ann Handley," "Everybody Writes," "apply the Handley framework," or asks for help with content voice, writing quality, or copy that needs to sound more human, or defining a brand voice. Not for structural/narrative frameworks (use the storybrand skill for that).

Ships with 4 reference guides the agent reads as it works.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "ann-handley" -g
Writing & Messaging storybrand

StoryBrand (SB7)

Write or audit homepage, landing-page, and ad copy so the customer is the hero and the message is clear.

Try this prompt
“Use the storybrand skill to audit the copy on this homepage.”
Details & solo install

Apply the StoryBrand SB7 framework to create or evaluate customer-facing copy. Two modes — Write (homepage, landing page, email, ad, one-liner) and Audit (review existing copy against SB7 checklist). Invoke when user says "use StoryBrand," "SB7," "apply the framework," or requests help with brand messaging, homepage copy, or marketing copy where narrative structure matters. Not for blog posts, SEO articles, or general writing.

Ships with 4 reference guides the agent reads as it works.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "storybrand" -g
Writing & Messaging storytelling

Science of Storytelling

Give founder stories, About pages, and case studies a real narrative arc that keeps people reading.

Try this prompt
“Use the storytelling skill to turn these notes into a founder story.”
Details & solo install

Apply Will Storr's Science of Storytelling framework (Sacred Flaw, theory of control, dramatic question, change-driven openings) to long-form narrative copy where engagement matters more than direct-response structure. Two modes — Write (founder narrative, brand story, About page, case study, blog hook, long-form sales) and Audit (review existing narrative for character flaw, change, curiosity gap, transformation arc). Invoke when user says "use Storr," "Science of Storytelling," "sacred flaw," "make this more compelling," or requests help with founder stories, About pages, case studies, brand origin, or any narrative where character + transformation is the point. Not for homepages, ad headlines, or scan-first marketing surfaces — use the storybrand skill for those.

Ships with 5 reference guides the agent reads as it works.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "storytelling" -g
Research buyer-personas

Buyer Personas

Turn real call transcripts and reviews into a persona built on what actually drives buyers.

Try this prompt
“Use the buyer-personas skill to build a persona from these sales call transcripts.”
Details & solo install

Use when building a buyer persona, customer persona, or ICP from real inputs — sales/discovery call transcripts (Fathom), win-loss interviews, surveys, reviews, CRM won/lost notes — and you want a decision-focused persona, not a demographic profile. Triggers like "make a buyer persona", "build a persona for <client/segment>", "turn these call transcripts into a persona", "what drives these buyers". Applies the Kraus & Revella 5 Rings of Buying Insight method.

Ships with 1 reference guide the agent reads as it works.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "buyer-personas" -g
Design & Build pesty-frontend

Pesty Frontend

Build dashboards and client reports in our dark-navy design system — on-brand by default.

Try this prompt
“Use the pesty-frontend skill to build a one-page KPI dashboard from this data.”
Details & solo install

Build or modify Pesty Marketing frontend — dashboards, internal tools, and client reports. Enforces the established dark navy design system (Epilogue + Montserrat, #001c28 background, CSS variable tokens). NOT for external client websites built in WordPress.

Ships with 2 reference guides the agent reads as it works.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "pesty-frontend" -g
Design & Build ui-design

UI Design

Design or audit any interface — layout, type, color, forms — against professional UI standards.

Try this prompt
“Use the ui-design skill to review this screenshot of our signup page.”
Details & solo install

Apply Master UI Design + Practical UI frameworks to build or audit interface designs (components, layouts, typography, color, forms, buttons, navigation, copywriting). Invoke when user says "use ui-design," "audit this UI," "review the design," or asks for help building/improving an interface, component, or screen. General-purpose (not Pesty-specific; use the pesty-frontend skill for that).

Ships with 8 reference guides the agent reads as it works.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "ui-design" -g
Content Ops yt-structure

YouTube to Markdown

Turn a YouTube video, talk, or article into a clean, citable Markdown doc for a knowledge library.

Try this prompt
“Use the yt-structure skill to structure this YouTube video: <link>”
Details & solo install

Use when turning a YouTube video, talk, podcast, or web article into a clean, citable Markdown document for an LLM knowledge library or RAG/OKF bundle — triggers like "transcribe and structure this video", "structure this transcript", "add this talk/article to the library". Covers pulling captions, faithful structuring, and editor's-note / [?] flagging.

npx skills add Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills --skill "yt-structure" -g

Pesty Marketing is a pest-control marketing agency — these are the frameworks our own team's agents run on for real client work. Talk to Pesty →

Updated July 2026 · MIT license · Source: github.com/Pesty-Marketing/agent-skills

Want to add a skill? Read the skill-writing guide and add it in the repo (not ~/.claude/skills) — or drop skill ideas in #pesty-crew.

Built by Pesty Marketing, a pest-control marketing agency → pestymarketing.com
